inputs.label: Pressure (mmHg)
inputs.businessContext: Measured pressure in millimeters of mercury, standard atmosphere = 760 mmHg

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from mmHg to psi (1 mmHg = 0.0193368 psi). Adjust for custom calibrations.

inputs.label: Offset
inputs.businessContext: Calibration offset in psi to correct systematic measurement error.

inputs.label: Output Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the rounded output.
